titles.en: Chapter on Offspring, Milking, and Riding of Sacrificial Animals
Chapter on Offspring, Milking, and Riding of Sacrificial Animals

segments: : «كَانَ عَلِيٌّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ إِذَا سَاقَ اَلْبَدَنَةَ وَ مَرَّ عَلَى اَلْمُشَاةِ حَمَلَهُمْ عَلَى بَدَنَةٍ وَ إِنْ ضَلَّتْ رَاحِلَةُ رَجُلٍ وَ مَعَهُ بَدَنَةٌ رَكِبَهَا غَيْرَ مُضِرٍّ وَ لاَ مُثْقِلٍ».
arabic.text: : «كَانَ عَلِيٌّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ إِذَا سَاقَ اَلْبَدَنَةَ وَ مَرَّ عَلَى اَلْمُشَاةِ حَمَلَهُمْ عَلَى بَدَنَةٍ وَ إِنْ ضَلَّتْ رَاحِلَةُ رَجُلٍ وَ مَعَهُ بَدَنَةٌ رَكِبَهَا غَيْرَ مُضِرٍّ وَ لاَ مُثْقِلٍ».

segments:
Hadith.3085 - Hammad narrated from Hariz that Abu Abdullah (as) said:
"When Imam Ali (as) brought the sacrificial camels, he would let the pedestrians ride on a camel. If a man's riding animal was lost and he had a sacrificial camel, he could ride it, provided he did not harm it or overburden it."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.3085 - Hammad narrated from Hariz that Abu Abdullah (as) said:
"When Imam Ali (as) brought the sacrificial camels, he would let the pedestrians ride on a camel. If a man's riding animal was lost and he had a sacrificial camel, he could ride it, provided he did not harm it or overburden it."

narratorChain.raw: 3085 - رَوَى حَمَّادٌ عَنْ حَرِيزٍ أَنَّ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

parts.text: حَرِيزٍ أَنَّ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ

titles.en: Chapter on Offspring, Milking, and Riding of Sacrificial Animals

segments: «قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ «يَرْكَبُهَا غَيْرَ مُجْهِدٍ وَ لاَ مُتْعِبٍ ».
arabic.text: «قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ «يَرْكَبُهَا غَيْرَ مُجْهِدٍ وَ لاَ مُتْعِبٍ ».

segments:
Hadith.3086 - Ya'qub ibn Shu'ayb asked Abu Abdullah (as) about a man—can he ride his hady (sacrificial animal) if he needs to?
Imam (as) replied: "The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace and blessings be upon him and his family) said: 'He may ride it as long as he does not overburden or exhaust it.'"
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.3086 - Ya'qub ibn Shu'ayb asked Abu Abdullah (as) about a man—can he ride his hady (sacrificial animal) if he needs to?
Imam (as) replied: "The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace and blessings be upon him and his family) said: 'He may ride it as long as he does not overburden or exhaust it.'"

narratorChain.raw: 3086 - وَ سَأَلَ يَعْقُوبُ بْنُ شُعَيْبٍ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ أَ يَرْكَبُ هَدْيَهُ إِنِ اِحْتَاجَ إِلَيْهِ فَقَالَ

parts.text: سَأَلَ يَعْقُوبُ بْنُ شُعَيْبٍ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ :
اَلرَّجُلِ أَ يَرْكَبُ هَدْيَهُ إِنِ اِحْتَاجَ إِلَيْهِ

titles.en: Chapter on Offspring, Milking, and Riding of Sacrificial Animals

segments: : «كَانَ عَلِيٌّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ يَحْلُبُ اَلْبَدَنَةَ وَ يَحْمِلُ عَلَيْهَا غَيْرَ مُضِرٍّ ».
arabic.text: : «كَانَ عَلِيٌّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ يَحْلُبُ اَلْبَدَنَةَ وَ يَحْمِلُ عَلَيْهَا غَيْرَ مُضِرٍّ ».

segments:
Hadith.3087 - Mansur ibn Hazim narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"Imam Ali (as) used to milk the sacrificial camel and allow others to ride it, provided it was not harmed."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.3087 - Mansur ibn Hazim narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"Imam Ali (as) used to milk the sacrificial camel and allow others to ride it, provided it was not harmed."

narratorChain.raw: 3087 - وَ رَوَى مَنْصُورُ بْنُ حَازِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on Offspring, Milking, and Riding of Sacrificial Animals

segments: اَللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ «لَكُمْ فِيهٰا مَنٰافِعُ إِلىٰ أَجَلٍ مُسَمًّى » قَالَ «إِنِ اِحْتَاجَ إِلَى ظَهْرِهَا رَكِبَهَا مِنْ غَيْرِ أَنْ يَعْنُفَ عَلَيْهَا وَ إِنْ كَانَ لَهَا لَبَنٌ حَلَبَهَا حِلاَباً لاَ يَنْهَكُهَا ».
arabic.text: اَللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ «لَكُمْ فِيهٰا مَنٰافِعُ إِلىٰ أَجَلٍ مُسَمًّى » قَالَ «إِنِ اِحْتَاجَ إِلَى ظَهْرِهَا رَكِبَهَا مِنْ غَيْرِ أَنْ يَعْنُفَ عَلَيْهَا وَ إِنْ كَانَ لَهَا لَبَنٌ حَلَبَهَا حِلاَباً لاَ يَنْهَكُهَا ».

segments:
Hadith.3088 - Abu Basir narrated from Imam (as) regarding the words of Allah (swt), the Exalted: "For you, there are benefits in them until a specified term" (Surah Al-Hajj 22:33).
Imam (as) said: "If one needs to use its back, he may ride it without being harsh on it. And if it has milk, he may milk it in a way that does not exhaust it."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.3088 - Abu Basir narrated from Imam (as) regarding the words of Allah (swt), the Exalted: "For you, there are benefits in them until a specified term" (Surah Al-Hajj 22:33).
Imam (as) said: "If one needs to use its back, he may ride it without being harsh on it. And if it has milk, he may milk it in a way that does not exhaust it."

narratorChain.raw: 3088 - وَ رَوَى أَبُو بَصِيرٍ عَنْهُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : فِي قَوْلِ

parts.text: 3088 - وَ رَوَى أَبُو بَصِيرٍ عَنْهُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : فِي قَوْلِ
